videoDescriptions.7605360479321541895: This is something I’ve always found interesting in South Asian culture- the reference to marriage as “love marriage” vs. arranged. I’ve never understood it, nor do I agree with the rhetoric. I’m proud to be Indian and I also will never call my own marriage anything other than just marriage. Because all marriage contains love.  #desi #indian #southasian #indianwedding #fyp
videoDescriptions.7602857558168128786: One of the biggest problems in the south Asian community pt. 2.  On today’s episode, we discuss the concept of forcing your child to marry a specific kind of person that fits your own ideals rather than theirs.  I’m proud to be Indian, but I’m also proud to know that this cycle ends with me.  #indianwedding #marriage #desi #southasian #indian

videoDescriptions.7586507646086171934: Replying to @johnapple08 few things I missed: 1. I didn’t apply for CS because I thought AI was gonna take it over. Now that I’m in the industry I know that this is false. If I could go back to college admissions I’d be a CS + math major. 2. I understand that my degrees don’t really apply to QT, but nevertheless this still piqued my interest. Again, if I could go back to college apps I’d be a different major 3. Maybe QR is possible as an undergrad junior, but we’ll have to see Overall, it can just be “money”, but If I wanted to make guaranteed money and that’s all then I would’ve just been a doctor or lawyer or gone into IB. But not only does QT/QR make good money, it’s also an industry that really interests me intellectually. I’ve never really put my intellectual potential to the test, and this goal is a great way for me to do just that #quant #internship #career

videoDescriptions.7574526387659263262: $10 LOBSTER ROLLS!! @angiesfoodconcepts just opened in Plano and these prices are crazyyyy! 🤩  📍Angie’s Lobster  Address: 701 W. 15th St, Plano  It has a drive-thru and indoor seating Their menu pulls from both Angie’s Lobster + Angie’s Prime Grill, which means: 🦞 $9.99 Maine Lobster Rolls 🥗 $4.99 Big Salads with grilled-to-order antibiotic-free chicken or seared falafel 🍤 Wild-caught Mexican colossal shrimp 🦀 North Atlantic snow crab 🐟 Fried North Atlantic cod 🔥 Warm bowls + grilled burritos They control their entire supply chain—from their own wharf in Maine to their Phoenix distribution center—which keeps the food premium and the pricing low. Best part? Angie’s is inspired by the founder’s mom, who built her life around food, hard work, and heart. 💜 #planotx #dallastx #dallasfoodie #dallasrestaurants
